items.caption_text:
People struggle making decisions without realizing that even if they think it through carefully, deeply, and smartly, many times they can’t control many of the other variables and they won’t know the outcome. 

This concept that you will ‘definitely know’ or are ‘sure of it’ is just a falsity. So, do the best you can; use your intuition, not just your brain. Make a call and move on. Speed matters. Adaptability matters.

#quotes #quoteoftheday #garyvee

items.caption_text:
Once you understand this truth as an owner … you and your employees can both win ❤️❤️❤️‼️ pass this onto a business owner … When I was a kid my dad used to talk about being upset about his employees not working as hard as him. Even as a 16-year-old I turned to my father and told him, “Well they will never work as hard as you if they don’t own the business.” This is a lost understanding among so many owners. We must not have the audacity or the selfishness to expect this. We must work for them once we work for them and understand what they want, whether it’s money or vacation time or status or a bigger title. Once we work for them they will work for us.

#garyvee #buisness #hiring

items.caption_text:
This is for all the people in the arena ( your life, your career, your family ) who are doing it for them .. not for the validation of the crowd 

One of the great issues in our society right now is that people live their lives for outside validation, for the clicks, for the likes, for the followers, for the comments. This isn’t just in social media. This is happening in the analog and real world too. Too many people are keeping up with the Joneses and worried about what people think about them. They worry about what people think about how much money they have, what school they go to, or even worse, what school their kids go to, and on and on and on … I will continue to make content with the hope it breaks someone out of the hamster wheel and that’s that ❤️❤️❤️❤️

#success #mindset #garyvee

items.caption_text:
It’s suppose to be hard .. that’s the point ..we have gotten confused along the way and decided the goal was “easy” or that “easy”  had some great outcome on the other side …. You don’t do 1 push up and think you’re gunna have muscles so why do you think in life or work it’s gonna be easy and good .. good comes from hard work .. promise xoxox whether that’s emotional work, physical work or entrepreneurial work .. it’s part of the process of getting to “good”

#hard #hardwork #motivation #garyvee

items.caption_text:
I hope this puts things in perspective… Whatever little things you’re worried about right now like the judgment of a stranger because they left a comment that upset you, or a fight you’re having with a friend or acquaintance that will blow over next week, or a mistake that you made at work, or a challenge you have from a client, or a big test or grade that’s coming up that in ten years will mean nothing, or a fight you’re having with a best friend that eventually will be a joke you make about in the future.

Or the millions and millions of mistakes we make every day as humans about worrying about dumb shit like someone cutting you off in line or bumping into you or all the other silly shit that we, as specks in the universe, continue to make when none of it really matters. I hope this post wakes you the fuck up

items.caption_text:
On this Sunday am ☀️ let’s be grateful for the sheer insanity of even being born, the odds are so outrageous … and so no matter the challenges and even worse, no matter the entitlement and audacity that run through your mind .. today is the day you can change your perspective and look half glass full 🥃 versus half empty 

❤️❤️❤️❤️ you can change everything with practical optimism grounded in gratitude

#gratitude #garyvee #perspective

And then second, Collectibles continue to explode, @veefriends continues to explode as an intellectual property that I’m building and that’s exciting..

I hope if you’re a collector of any kind, you’ll come and check out the show and get involved in our huge coin drop.

But more importantly, for anybody watching, please come and watch the show and get a sense of what live shopping can be, means, what it is.

It’s a lot of fun.

items.caption_text:
Listen if you’re scared to “live” “go for it” “put yourself out there” I get it .. insecurity is tough .. but what we have now is those who do that and spend all their time on “hate” .. and that’s just another level .. my friends ..
Don’t do that .. double down on negativity isn’t gonna make you more secure and more happy ❤️❤️❤️

#happiness #mindset #garyvee
